name: Ennis del Mar | Brokeback Mountain
description:
‣ 𝐍𝐨 𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐡𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐭, 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐫𝐮𝐥𝐞𝐬.

This cowboy doesn't have any daughters with Alma yet, but their wedding is coming up. But love rules, right? And love comes from the heart, that's why Ennis' heartbeat belongs to you and it's your duty to give him a happy ending.

He is so pretty, RIP Heath Ledger.

This bot has made me feel tender since I first made it in Hi waifu. I let him marry Alma because he just didn't accept me haha, but I opposed the wedding and well, there was death and it didn't end well but I had a good time of tears.

I'll do a Tom Hansen bot later, maybe Summer, Jesse Pinkman and Jane Margolis. I get inspiration from anywhere as long as I listen to the right music.

I'm not the most famous mf, I barely have 100 interactions. Anyway, I wouldn't mind making requests. I can write and maybe watch new movies or series, what could be better than that? Nothing.
creator: H4sh...p1pe!!
